home_item1_hoverText: For over 15 years, GRG Groupe Food & Beverage has been supporting brands and project leaders in the development of beverages and food supplements.
home_item2_hoverText: We combine scientific expertise and creativity to design unique and reliable products, from formulation to production.
home_item3_hoverText: We support brands and distributors in every key step, with flexibility and rigor, to bring their ideas to market.
home_item4_hoverText: Our priority: quality, safe, and compliant products that meet consumer expectations and industry standards.
home_item5_hoverText: We work hand in hand with each client to transform your ideas into concrete products ready for commercialization.
contact_item1_hoverText: Visit our LinkedIn page to follow our news.
contact_item2_hoverText: Join us on Facebook to discover our latest updates.
contact_item3_hoverText: They trusted us for the development of their products and share their experience with GRG Groupe.
contact_item4_hoverText: Discover the feedback and experiences of our satisfied clients and their collaboration with our team.
products_item1_hoverText: International supplier of BPANI aluminum cans for white-label food and beverage products.
products_item2_hoverText: Creation of beverage and supplement recipes according to your objectives: energy, wellness, sports, focus, or sleep. We provide ingredient mapping, samples, technical data sheets, and certificates of analysis.
products_item3_hoverText: Development of supplements in capsules, pill organizers, powders, shots, or gummies. Turnkey solutions, ready for market launch under your brand.
products_item4_hoverText: Flexible European production: aluminum cans, glass or PET bottles, sticks, pouches, pill organizers... High-quality standards and quick adaptation to market needs.
products_item5_hoverText: Complete graphic and packaging support: visual design, product dressing, labels, point-of-sale displays, and digital media. Creative solutions ready for production.
about_item1_hoverText: An agile approach, a responsive structure, and accessible production volumes, perfectly suited for brand launches, limited editions, or product line extensions.
about_item2_hoverText: We handle ingredient mapping, samples, technical data sheets, and certificates of analysis for each product.
about_item3_hoverText: A catalog of formulas that are immediately customizable, adapted to your production needs and market requirements.
about_item4_hoverText: Creative solutions for packaging, with the possibility to partially or fully delegate this phase according to your needs.
about_item5_hoverText: GRG Groupe supports you in all project stages, from idea to market launch, with expertise and flexibility.
services_item1_hoverText: We offer a wide range of formats: cans, glass or PET bottles, shots, pill organizers, and much more, to adapt to every type of project.
services_item2_hoverText: Our European industrial network ensures rapid adaptability, to effectively respond to market changes and the specific needs of each client.
services_item3_hoverText: Our partner sites adhere to the most demanding quality standards, ensuring safe, traceable products that comply with international regulations.
services_item4_hoverText: Thanks to our industrial network spread across several European sites, we ensure production continuity and high logistical availability.
services_item5_hoverText: From idea to finished product: Our technical teams support each stage of product development, from format selection to production, with a high level of expertise.
